text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Mmm, thank you, for doing your best.
choice_data_list: To think I couldn't even get one…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Some days are like that, one day 
it's sunny, another it's cloudy.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It was only my request anyway. Just 
the sentiment is more than enough.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
There are plenty more better souvenirs. 
C'mon, let's get going.
